mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp for mental health from workplace bullying in Midvale?
mainEntity.text: Can I get workers comp for mental health from workplace bullying in Midvale?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if physical injury accompanies or it's a compensable occupational disease; pure stress claims rarely approved without physical manifestation[1].

suggestedAnswer.text: Midvale claims for anxiety/PTSD need link to physical trauma or Schedule 1 occupation. Utah scrutinizes psych claims—document harassment, get psych eval. Insurers deny 80%; appeal with expert testimony. Third-party bully suits possible[1][3].

name: Mental Health Work Injury Claims Midvale UT
description: Yes, if physical injury accompanies or it's a compensable occupational disease; pure stress claims rarely approved without physical manifestation[1].
